# Channel-Market Fit Protocol

Product-market fit is not enough. The product needs a channel that can repeatedly reach the right buyers at viable cost.

## Test sequence

1. Map demand surfaces.
2. Test high-intent search if volume exists.
3. Test competitor/alternative capture.
4. Test proof-led retargeting.
5. Test social creative for problem awareness.
6. Test founder-led organic content.
7. Test outbound or partner channels for accounts that cannot be reached cheaply through ads.

## Channel fit signals

| Signal | Meaning |
|---|---|
| CTR above benchmark | Message/channel relevance exists. |
| Low bounce + proof engagement | Buyer is inspecting. |
| Trial/lead starts | Offer has enough pull. |
| Activation after signup | Product value is reachable. |
| Paid conversion | Economics may exist. |
| Repeatable CAC | Channel is viable. |

If a channel has no inspection signal after several well-matched tests, route to another channel or buyer state.
